ops.text: Full Restoration of Uploader.kt with original structure and hardened resilience
Fix syntax error: properly close Zoom useEffect and restore component structure
Add missing ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE permission to Manifest
Enhance Uploader with granular TTS feedback for every stage and error condition
Harden Stealth Mode: Prevent Loudspeaker leaks and implement Auto-Kill on headphone unplug

ops.find_block:
private fun speakStatus(message: String, immediate: Boolean, customId: String? = null) {
        val prefs = getSharedPreferences("monitor_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
        val headsetOnly = prefs.getBoolean("headset_only", true)
        val am = getSystemService(Context.AUDIO_SERVICE) as android.media.AudioManager
        val hasHeadset = am.isWiredHeadsetOn || am.isBluetoothA2dpOn

        if (headsetOnly && !hasHeadset) return

private fun playCurrent() {
        val list = playlists[currentType] ?: return
        if (currentIndex < 0 || currentIndex >= list.size) currentIndex = 0
        val file = list[currentIndex]
